lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows heavy wear on the interior and exterior. It is not in reliable running order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. While it does start, it suffers from several issues including a failing transmission and noticeable engine leaks. The body shows substantial rust and several dents, and the interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery. It is being sold as-is, primarily for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between reliability and style! It has been well-maintained and remains in great mechanical shape, offering a smooth and dependable ride. While you might find some minor signs of careful previous use, it still looks wonderful and is ready for many more miles of adventure. This is a solid, honest car that’s perfect for someone who appreciates quality and reliability!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The engine currently runs rough and exhibits significant oil leaks, while the transmission shifts harshly between gears. On the exterior, there is noticeable clear coat failure on the hood and roof, along with several deep scratches and a dent on the rear passenger door. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the driver's seat and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a major project or a source for parts.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It has visible cosmetic damage and several mechanical issues that require attention. Both the exterior and interior show significant signs of wear.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist, offering an exemplary balance of mechanical integrity and sophisticated presentation. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, the automobile exhibits consistent performance and a refined interior environment. It remains a premier selection for those who demand reliability without compromising on aesthetic appeal or professional stature.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this car is ready for its next adventure. I've looked after it well, and it’s looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle presents beautifully, showcasing a well-preserved exterior with a deep, lustrous finish that catches the light from every angle. While it has seen some highway miles, resulting in minor, expected road peppering on the front bumper, the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery has been meticulously conditioned, showing only light softening on the driver’s side bolster consistent with careful use. Every electronic feature, from the responsive navigation system to the dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine delivers smooth, consistent power, backed by a comprehensive service history that demonstrates consistent preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. This is a reliable, turn-key example that perfectly balances luxury with everyday practicality, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound driver’s car featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is reinforced with a rear subframe plate kit to ensure torsional rigidity, while the suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein dampers for improved damping rates. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment to maintain valvetrain precision. Power is delivered through a tactile six-speed manual gearbox to a mechanical limited-slip differential, providing exceptional exit traction. While the finish shows light road patina, the drivetrain and kinematics remain tight and highly communicative.

This exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle offers a fantastic blend of reliability and modern comfort. The exterior paint maintains a high-gloss finish with only minimal, expected signs of use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Every feature, including the premium sound system, navigation, and heated seats, is fully operational. Under the hood, the car has been serviced regularly, showing strong compression and a smooth-shifting gearbox. With a complete set of service records and recent maintenance already performed, this car represents a solid investment for anyone seeking a dependable, high-quality driver that requires no immediate attention.
